title: CNCI Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Assistant Posts
description: The Chittaranjan National Cancer Institute (CNCI) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Project Assistant Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their M.Sc. can apply for the CNCI Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process, application fee, ...
